ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the employee */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "position_title" TEXT /* Title of the employee's position */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the employee belongs to */,
  "annual_salary" INTEGER /* Annual salary of the employee */,
  "review_score" REAL /* Performance review score of the employee */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was terminated (if applicable) */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the employee's contract */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the employee's contract */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Current employment status (e.g., active, terminated) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the employee */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the employee */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the employee */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the employee */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "department_head_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department head (reference to the employees table) */,
  "budget" INTEGER /* Annual budget allocated to the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_department_head_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_head_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_title" TEXT /* Title of the position */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the position belongs to */,
  "salary_grade" TEXT /* Salary grade of the position */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the position */,
  "required_skills" TEXT /* Required skills for the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance review */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee being reviewed */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was conducted */,
  "review_score" REAL /* Performance review score */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer (reference to the employees table) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the reviewer */,
  "goals" TEXT /* Goals for the employee to work towards */,
  "areas_for_improvement" TEXT /* Areas where the employee needs improvement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payroll_records" (
  "payroll_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payroll record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "pay_period_start" TEXT /* Start date of the pay period */,
  "pay_period_end" TEXT /* End date of the pay period */,
  "gross_pay" REAL /* Gross pay for the period */,
  "net_pay" REAL /* Net pay for the period */,
  "taxes_withheld" REAL /* Taxes withheld from the pay */,
  "benefits_withheld" REAL /* Benefits withheld from the pay */,
  "pay_frequency" TEXT /* Pay frequency (e.g., bi-weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payroll_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payroll_records_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the contract */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the contract */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Date the contract is eligible for renewal */,
  "contract_type" TEXT /* Type of contract (e.g., permanent, temporary) */,
  "contract_terms" TEXT /* Terms of the contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benefits" (
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benefit */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "benefit_type" TEXT /* Type of benefit (e.g., health insurance, retirement plan) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the benefit */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the benefit */,
  "benefit_amount" REAL /* Amount of the benefit */,
  "provider" TEXT /* Provider of the benefit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benefit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benefits_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "module_accessed" TEXT /* Module of the EMS accessed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_access_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_roles" (
  "employee_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee-role assignment */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date the role was assigned */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Date the role expires (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_roles_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "onboarding_processes" (
  "onboarding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each onboarding process */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the onboarding process */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Completion date of the onboarding process */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the onboarding process (e.g., in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("onboarding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_onboarding_processes_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offboarding_processes" (
  "offboarding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each offboarding process */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the offboarding process */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Completion date of the offboarding process */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the offboarding process (e.g., in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offboarding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_offboarding_processes_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
